creator: edwin@mavetju.org
text:
On Fri, Sep 07, 2007 at 02:07:19PM +0900, NAKAJI Hiroyuki wrote:
> >>>>> In <200709061230.l86CU68S060585@freefall.freebsd.org> 
> >>>>>	Edwin Groothuis <edwin@mavetju.org> wrote:
> 
> >  > >Synopsis:       [new port] www/plone3
>  
> >  Does this require a repocopy from www/plone ?
>  
> No.
> 
> o Plone 3.0 requires Zope 2.10.4, and Plone 2.5.3 requires Zope 2.9.x.
> o Zope 2.9.x and Zope 2.10.x have different port skelton, www/zope29 and
>   www/zope210 respectively
> 
> and then www/plone and www/plone3 do not conflict with each other.

It's more the history preservation I (well, others) am worried
about.

Edwin
